commit_scope: Retry Hostinger deploy script sync operations so transient SSH/SCP timeouts do not block production verification after keyscan fallback succeeds.

local_validation.notes: Manual Hostinger deploy run 26764349849 reached Configure SSH but failed in Sync tracked deploy script to VPS after the first scp timed out connecting to 187.77.152.42:22. This patch retries each scp/ssh sync command with explicit ConnectTimeout and ServerAlive settings.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A transient timeout during Hostinger sync should be retried up to five times before the deploy is marked failed.
test_flows: Hostinger Auto Deploy reaches Sync tracked deploy script to VPS and retries scp/ssh failures instead of failing after a single timeout.

phase_gate.reason: This deploy reliability fix still needs PR checks, merge, Hostinger deploy, and public verification before moving to the next BML parity slice.

evidence_refs: .github/workflows/hostinger-auto-deploy.yml sync step now wraps scp and ssh calls in retry_remote.
Manual deploy run 26764349849 failed before this patch on a single scp connection timeout.
